# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe what this PR does and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Dependency update
- [ ] Other

## Related Issues

Closes #

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] Linting passes (`pnpm lint` / `dotnet build`)
- [ ] No secrets or personal data committed
- [ ] Responsive on mobile
- [ ] i18n keys added for any new UI strings
